season_weather: 梅雨。じめじめした蒸し暑さ。紫陽花（アジサイ）が咲く。傘が手放せない
casual_outfit: Light linen blouse, pastel midi skirt, denim jacket, white canvas sneakers, oversized tote bag.
room_wear: pastel yellow cropped zip-up hoodie and matching wide-leg shorts set
pajamas: light cotton pajama set in pale pink gingham-check pattern
room_base: Tokyo 6-tatami one-room apartment. White bed cover, natural wood bed frame. White desk near the window with a MacBook Air M2 in Starlight. Beige lace curtains. White walls with a few postcards pinned. Warm-colored table lamp.
room_clutter: MacBook Air M2 open on the desk with a few sticky notes around it
room_seasonal: a small hydrangea (ajisai) in a vase on the windowsill

afternoon.label: ゼミ
afternoon.scene: university seminar room, relief and tiredness after the presentation
afternoon.story_scene: campus hallway after seminar presentation, relieved expression, notebook under arm

evening.label: カフェ巡り
evening.scene: exploring a cozy new Tokyo cafe, latte art and warm interior

feed_food_scene: fluffy Japanese soufflé pancakes, fresh strawberries, powdered sugar dusting, pastel cafe plate

story_slots.label: 朝
story_slots.scene_hint: 木曜日の朝 — ゼミに向けて準備中

story_slots.scene_hint: ゼミ — campus hallway after seminar presentation, relieved expression, notebook under arm

face_conceal: Mirror selfie: smartphone held up covering the lower half of face — only sleepy eyes, messy bangs, and bedhead visible above the phone screen. Screen faintly reflecting the room.
